name: Emanation
scaffolding_intent: Emits particle sprites around the entity to reveal non-visible properties or emotions, scaffolding sensory adjectives and internal responses
correction_intent: Child described incorrect emotions. Variants: P2_shame (embarrassment), P2_cold (discomfort), P2_great (joy/pride), P2_love (affection), P2_anger (frustration), P2_fear (anxiety). Return the specific variant, e.g. P2_anger
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't expressed the emotions of a character. Variants: P2_shame (embarrassment), P2_cold (discomfort), P2_great (joy/pride), P2_love (affection), P2_anger (frustration), P2_fear (anxiety). Return the specific variant, e.g. P2_love

variants.P2_shame: Child feels ashamed, embarrassed, or guilty
variants.P2_cold: Child or entity feels cold, shivering, or uncomfortable
variants.P2_great: Child or entity feels happy, excited, proud, or amazed
variants.P2_love: Child or entity feels love, affection, or tenderness
variants.P2_anger: Child or entity feels angry, frustrated, or irritated
variants.P2_fear: Child or entity feels scared, worried, or anxious
